summary: Security accepts the Radar Task UI after R2. Server actions now perform an in-action local admin session check before mutations, the mock scan control still posts only to the protected /api/scans/run endpoint with useMockSerp=true, the README direct API example includes authenticated session handling, and no provider/deployment/ownership/security scope creep was found.
decisions: ACCEPT: Server Actions verify local admin session with cookies(), adminSessionCookieName, and verifyAdminSessionToken() before create/update/deactivate mutations.
ACCEPT: Deactivate remains soft-delete behavior and requires explicit confirmation.
ACCEPT: The UI does not expose real secrets, public sharing, production ownership, provider setup, deployment, CI/CD, DNS, or paid service behavior.
ACCEPT: README shows authenticated session handling for the protected direct scan API call.
